rationale: Re-assert each per-run `forall|p|` / `forall|c|` ensures so its trigger fires in both branches, then chain the spec-fn-level set equalities (`free_pages_*`, `allocated_pages_2m/1g`, `mapped_pages_*`, container-map domains) through `pre_self_` via set extensionality (`=~=`). Every assertion is something Verus must verify — no `assume`, `admit`, or external-body escape — so the prelude is sound regardless of whether it closes the final `det_*_equal` (which additionally requires `r1.0 == r2.0`, not pinned by this spec).
